global_style: cinematic realistic CGI render, Unreal Engine 5, octane render, volumetric lighting, hyperrealistic, dramatic horror, subtle film grain

characters.name: Narrator
characters.description: The adult protagonist walking home late at night.

characters.name: The Boy
characters.description: An ~8-year-old boy carrying heavy bags home at night.

scenes.narration_excerpt: I finished work late that night.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Wide shot of a weary office worker stepping out of a cold corporate building into a bleak city night, foggy atmosphere, dark asphalt reflecting neon light

scenes.narration_excerpt: It was past midnight when I headed home.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Tracking shot behind the main character walking down a dim pavement, shadows stretching away from cold streetlamps

scenes.narration_excerpt: The streets were empty.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Wide architectural shot of a completely abandoned urban street crossing, desolate, wind blowing a loose piece of trash down the gutter

scenes.narration_excerpt: The city was quiet.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Cinematic high-angle crane shot looking down at dark buildings, dead silence, isolated window lights casting long eerie glows

scenes.narration_excerpt: I was tired, and I wanted my bed.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close-up of the main character's exhausted face, blinking heavily, rubbing tired eyes under a flickering yellow streetlamp

scenes.narration_excerpt: My way home went past a small park.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Long shot of a dark iron fence of an urban park on the right side of frame, twisted bare tree silhouettes reaching into the night sky

scenes.narration_excerpt: I always walked that way.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Slow moving POV shot tracking along the cracked concrete sidewalk directly next to the dark park path

scenes.narration_excerpt: That night, the park was not empty.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Sudden reveal shot from behind a thick tree trunk, an unexpected static silhouette of a small figure breaking the straight lines of the park path

scenes.narration_excerpt: A boy stood near the path, in the dark, with his back to me.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Low angle shot of a small boy standing completely motionless in deep shadow, facing away from camera, an oversized dark coat draped over his shoulders

scenes.narration_excerpt: He was small.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Tight medium shot emphasizing the small, shockingly fragile frame of the child standing frozen in the dark

scenes.narration_excerpt: Eight years old, maybe nine.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close-up from directly behind showing the small boy's messy hair, unmoving neck and completely rigid shoulders

scenes.narration_excerpt: In each hand he held a large, full bag.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close-up tracking downward to the boy's sides, revealing two massive bulging black canvas bags held tightly in his fists

scenes.narration_excerpt: He held them as if they weighed nothing at all,
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Medium shot of the boy's rigid arms, perfectly steady, showing zero physical strain or muscular tension

scenes.narration_excerpt: but the bags looked heavy.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Extreme close-up of the dense, stretched fabric of the massive black bags, bulging heavily as if filled with solid lead

scenes.narration_excerpt: A child, alone, after midnight.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: High angle wide shot framing the solitary adult protagonist staring at the isolated little boy in the middle of a desolate dark park

scenes.narration_excerpt: I could not walk past him.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Tracking shot focusing on the main character's heavy leather shoes stopping dead in their tracks on the dark asphalt

scenes.narration_excerpt: I came closer.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Over-the-shoulder slow tracking shot as the protagonist steps forward into the shadow canopy toward the silent child

scenes.narration_excerpt: “Hey,” I said. “Are you okay?
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Medium profile shot of the main character speaking, breath condensation visible in the freezing night air, an anxious expression

scenes.narration_excerpt: Those look heavy. Let me carry them.”
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The main character reaching out a hand cautiously toward the handles of the heavy black bags held by the boy

scenes.narration_excerpt: He did not turn around.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close up on the back of the boy's head, unmoving, completely ignoring the spoken words, uncanny stillness

scenes.narration_excerpt: He did not answer.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Wide static shot highlighting the deep unsettling space between the adult and the child under the pitch-black sky

scenes.narration_excerpt: I took the bags from his hands.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close-up of the main character's hands gripping the handles of the two large canvas bags, lifting them away from the boy's tiny pale fingers

scenes.narration_excerpt: And they nearly pulled me to the ground.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Jarring camera drop as the main character's arms snap downward violently under immense sudden unnatural weight

scenes.narration_excerpt: My arms shook. My back bent.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Medium shot of the main character's torso straining wildly, muscles flexing hard, spine arching down aggressively in severe physical struggle

scenes.narration_excerpt: I could barely hold them with both hands.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Tight shot of trembling white-knuckled fingers white with strain, desperately fighting to keep the heavy bags off the concrete

scenes.narration_excerpt: No bag should weigh that much.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Low-angle tracking shot focusing on the massive black bags scraping just an inch above the ground, radiating an unnatural gravity

scenes.narration_excerpt: But the boy had held one in each hand.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The camera pans quickly over to the boy's tiny empty completely relaxed hands resting normally and effortlessly at his sides

scenes.narration_excerpt: And he had held them like nothing.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close up of the boy's small unstrained profile standing completely casually, contrasting heavily with the protagonist's severe struggle

scenes.narration_excerpt: The moment the bags were mine, he began to walk.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The boy starts stepping forward smoothly down the dark path, moving away with robotic effortless precision into the night

scenes.narration_excerpt: So I followed.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Low angle tracking shot looking at the main character heavily shuffling forward, dragging the extreme weight of the bags behind the child

scenes.narration_excerpt: I told myself I was walking him home.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Wide atmospheric shot of the small boy walking smoothly ahead and the adult stumbling behind carrying the bags in the hazy foggy night

scenes.narration_excerpt: I wondered where his parents were.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Over-the-shoulder shot looking from the struggling adult toward the dark empty horizon of the street ahead, scanning for signs of life

scenes.narration_excerpt: Who sends a child into the night alone, with bags like these?
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Tracking wide shot down a dimly lit alleyway as the two strange figures move deeper into the industrial sector of the city

scenes.narration_excerpt: We walked. I do not know for how long.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Montage-like slow cross-fade showing time passing, heavy boots dragging on asphalt, the child maintaining an identical chilling distance ahead

scenes.narration_excerpt: He never looked back.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Direct shot of the boy's straight back, head perfectly facing forward, walking into a dense swirling patch of fog

scenes.narration_excerpt: He never slowed.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Profile tracking shot of the boy's legs moving at an identical unyielding rhythmic pace across the concrete

scenes.narration_excerpt: He never said a word.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Extreme close-up of the side of the boy's hidden face, lips tightly sealed, absolute cold silence

scenes.narration_excerpt: After a while I realized that I had not seen his face.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The main character's widened anxious eyes staring intently forward, suddenly gripped by a terrifying realization in the dark

scenes.narration_excerpt: I had not heard his voice. Not once.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: High angle tracking shot over the character's shoulder, highlighting the completely locked blank profile of the mysterious kid

scenes.narration_excerpt: I kept walking.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Low close-up of the protagonist's exhausted feet scraping along the hard sidewalk, step by painful step

scenes.narration_excerpt: The boy stopped at an old building.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The small boy stops abruptly in front of a looming decayed gothic brick apartment complex with dark dead windows

scenes.narration_excerpt: He opened the door and went in.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The heavy rusted iron door of the building creaks open on its own into pitch-black interior darkness, the boy steps effortlessly inside

scenes.narration_excerpt: I followed him inside.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The main character stepping over the threshold, pulling the immense weight of the bags into the dark abyss of the open doorway

scenes.narration_excerpt: And the moment I crossed into the dark, the world turned over.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Surreal cinematic shot where the geometry of the hallway begins to warp and spin violently, the walls sliding upside down in a dizzying visual vortex

scenes.narration_excerpt: Once, slowly, all the way around — and back.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: A warped hallway space tilting completely upside down before snapping back smoothly into reality, disorienting

scenes.narration_excerpt: Then it was still.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The environment suddenly locks rigid and quiet, all surreal movement completely ceasing, leaving thick heavy silence

scenes.narration_excerpt: Nothing had moved. But everything had changed.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The main character looking around wildly; the corridor looks identical yet the texture of reality feels fundamentally broken

scenes.narration_excerpt: A red light had risen around us — dim and weak,
scenes.keyframe_prompt: An eerie blood-red glow slowly bleeding from the seams of the floor and walls, filling the environment with a dim crimson light

scenes.narration_excerpt: as if old lamps had woken somewhere I could not see.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Ominous cinematic shot focusing on thick dust motes floating in the faint red illumination, shadows extending unnaturally

scenes.narration_excerpt: It barely reached the walls. The corners stayed dark.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Wide shot of the long hallway where the crimson center fades immediately into deep menacing pitch-black corner shadows

scenes.narration_excerpt: Even the air seemed red.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close up of the protagonist breathing out, the air in front of them tinted with an unnatural foggy crimson hue

scenes.narration_excerpt: I made a small plan.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Extreme close-up of the protagonist's sweating brow, eyes darting left and right to calculate an escape route

scenes.narration_excerpt: I would take him to his door, and then I would leave.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Point of view shot looking up a towering narrow concrete staircase engulfed in red light, aiming for the top exit

scenes.narration_excerpt: Something was not right about the place.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close-up of peeling wallpaper on the hallway walls warping and displaying faint unholy patterns under the crimson tint

scenes.narration_excerpt: We climbed the stairs.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Low angle tracking shot up the creaking wooden steps as the adult forces their trembling legs upward carrying the massive weight

scenes.narration_excerpt: First floor. Second floor.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: A rapid visual progression showing landing signs reading 1 then 2 emerging from the thick crimson haze

scenes.narration_excerpt: The building was silent.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Wide static shot of an empty corridor on the second floor, a completely dead unmoving atmosphere

scenes.narration_excerpt: Silent, and strange, though I could not say why.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: A slow push-in shot down a dark hallway where the shadows seem to gently pulse or breathe on their own

scenes.narration_excerpt: A question came to me, slow and quiet.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close up of the protagonist's eyes shifting in deep terror, realizing the complete anomaly of the situation

scenes.narration_excerpt: Is he even a boy?
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The camera tilts up to reveal the silhouette of the child waiting perfectly still at the top of the dark landing

scenes.narration_excerpt: I had not seen his face. I had not heard his voice.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Over-the-shoulder shot focusing on the blank textureless perfectly dark outline of the child's head from behind

scenes.narration_excerpt: And no boy holds that weight like nothing.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close-up on the protagonist's aching violently vibrating hands clamped onto the agonizingly heavy bags

scenes.narration_excerpt: If he was not a boy, then what was he?
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The child's silhouette seems to stretch slightly taller against the crimson backdrop, adopting an inhuman posture

scenes.narration_excerpt: I did not have an answer.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The main character shakes their head in confusion, overwhelmed by growing cosmic dread

scenes.narration_excerpt: I carried the bags, and I climbed.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Shaky tracking shot climbing the final flight of stairs, the heavy canvas bags dragging heavily across the wooden step edges

scenes.narration_excerpt: A few steps below the third floor, I began to hear voices.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Subtle camera lens vibration as the air begins to shake with a faint multi-layered echo of disembodied sound, distortion

scenes.narration_excerpt: Crying, soft and low, somewhere above me.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Tracking shot looking straight up into a dark ceiling well where a muffled agonizing weeping sound leaks from a high corridor

scenes.narration_excerpt: I kept climbing. Third floor.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The character reaches the third-floor landing, stepping onto ancient carpet, standing side by side with the silent boy

scenes.narration_excerpt: One door.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Direct frontal shot of a single ancient unmarked black wooden door at the very end of the short corridor

scenes.narration_excerpt: The crying was behind it, just on the other side.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The camera slowly dollies in closer to the wood grain of the dark door, the faint red light washing over its panels

scenes.narration_excerpt: I knocked.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close-up of the protagonist's trembling fist striking the heavy wood of the door twice

scenes.narration_excerpt: I wanted someone to open it and take the boy,
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Medium shot of the protagonist looking desperately at the door handle, waiting for anyone to claim the horrifying scenario

scenes.narration_excerpt: so that I could go home.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Main character looking back down the staircase, a deep longing for escape in their frantic expression

scenes.narration_excerpt: No one opened it.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Static wide shot of the silent corridor, the door remains completely unyielding and locked

scenes.narration_excerpt: The door opened on its own.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The heavy door slowly clicks and swings inward smoothly without anyone pushing it, revealing a pitch-black interior maw

scenes.narration_excerpt: And the boy turned around.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The child rotates around smoothly on his heels to face the protagonist directly for the first time

scenes.narration_excerpt: I saw his eyes. They were completely black.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Macro close-up revealing the boy's face: his eyes have no whites or pupils, two infinite glossy pitch-black voids reflecting nothing

scenes.narration_excerpt: I looked into them, and I fell.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The camera zooms straight into the black void of the eye socket as the background instantly blurs and dissolves out of focus

scenes.narration_excerpt: Down, and down,
scenes.keyframe_prompt: A tumbling disorienting abstract shot of a silhouette falling backwards through an endless space of dark volumetric fog

scenes.narration_excerpt: into the endless dark behind those eyes.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Wide celestial shot of deep crushing cosmic blackness, absolute void with faint floating ash or dust motes

scenes.narration_excerpt: The stairs were gone. The door was gone. The building was gone.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: A panoramic sweep showing complete non-existence, no physical architecture, just an endless dark void spanning forever

scenes.narration_excerpt: There was only darkness stretching in every direction.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: A lone camera tracking backward through the infinite empty shadow space, total desolation

scenes.narration_excerpt: Then I heard a voice. Not with my ears.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The protagonist clutching their head in pain inside the void as ripples of unseen acoustic energy distort the dark atmosphere

scenes.narration_excerpt: It came from everywhere at once, rolling through the emptiness around me.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: A visual shockwave of gray dust pulsing outwards from the dark center of the screen, representing a massive cosmic voice

scenes.narration_excerpt: The voice said: “Join me.”
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The absolute dark space seems to constrict inward, suffocatingly close, micro-vibrations in the fog

scenes.narration_excerpt: “No,” I said.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Close up on the protagonist's mouth defiantly gasping out a word in the pitch black

scenes.narration_excerpt: Then I put the bags down, and I was back in the building.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Match-cut: the hands abruptly let go of the heavy objects and with a sudden flash reality snaps back instantly into the solid third-floor hallway

scenes.narration_excerpt: I turned, and I went down the stairs.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: High-speed tracking shot descending the wooden stairs, the protagonist sprinting downwards in sheer panic away from the door

scenes.narration_excerpt: The red left the walls, floor by floor.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Visual effect shot as the crimson light rapidly drains down from the ceiling and walls, replaced by standard deep nighttime shadows

scenes.narration_excerpt: At the front door, the world was only the world again.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The protagonist bursts through the building's iron front gate out onto the regular urban sidewalk, panting heavily

scenes.narration_excerpt: Cold air. An empty street.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Wide shot of the crisp clear night city street under regular blue-tinted moonlight, normal and calm

scenes.narration_excerpt: The quiet city.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: A sweeping high angle view of the ordinary urban landscape sleeping under the midnight sky

scenes.narration_excerpt: I walked home. My arms did not ache anymore.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Medium tracking shot of the protagonist walking briskly, swinging their arms freely, a sense of intense physical relief on their face

scenes.narration_excerpt: I headed home again. I reached my building.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The protagonist approaches a normal familiar modern apartment building vestibule, scanning their keycard

scenes.narration_excerpt: I climbed to my floor.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Interior shot of a well-lit mundane carpeted apartment hallway as the protagonist walks safely towards their unit

scenes.narration_excerpt: I opened my door and went inside.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The protagonist unlocks their personal front door, stepping inside their dark comforting apartment, turning on a warm entryway light

scenes.narration_excerpt: I closed it behind me. I turned around.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: The protagonist shuts the door with a firm click, sighs with exhaustion, leans against it and turns to look into their living room

scenes.narration_excerpt: The two bags were on the floor of my home.
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Horror reveal shot. Sitting dead-center on the warm living room rug are the exact two massive bulging heavy black canvas bags
